zh.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola是NN De Mola的兒子，出生。他至少有2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola是NN De Mola的儿子，出生。他至少有2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mola
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Salvatore, Angelo, Antonio, Gennaro, Giulio, Primo, Sal, Secondo, Stefano.  Spanish Jose, Luis, Efrain, Emilio, Mario, Ana, Berta, Blanca, Digna, Edilberto, Elena, Estrella.
Italian: habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with Latin mola ‘mill, millstone’.
Catalan and Aragonese: habitational name from any of various places called Mola in Catalonia and Aragon, in particular the one in Teruel province (Aragon, Spain), from Latin mola ‘mill, millstone’.

variants.name: Molla
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mahbub, Abul, Ahamed, Farid, Mohammad, Nazrul, Rafiqul, Saiful, Selim, Shamsul.  Ethiopian Adane, Alemnesh, Belayneh, Belete, Berhanu, Getachew, Mesfin, Sisay, Worku.  Spanish Juan, Marcelino, Jose, Osvaldo.

Muslim (Indian subcontinent and Iran): status name from the title molla ‘mullah’, denoting someone with a qualification in Islamic religious learning, (ultimately) from Persian mulla, a derivative of Arabic maulā ‘scholar’. See also Mulla .
Turkish: ornamental name or status name from the title molla ‘mullah’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola was born as the son of NN De Mola. He had at least 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola est né, fils de NN De Mola. Il a eu au moins 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola wurde, als Sohn von NN De Mola geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola è nato il come figlio di NN De Mola. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De MolaはNN De Molaの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola(은)는 NN De Mola의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola nasceu filho de NN De Mola. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola родился. Его отца звали NN De Mola. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Henry De Mola nació como hijo de NN De Mola. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas.
